DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. I apologize for any mistakes the bot makes in advance.
